household_profile: Gia dinh 3 the he, co ong ba, bo me va 2 con nho
material_direction: Da tu nhien sang, go oak am, kim loai mau toi, son be va kem
color_direction: Warm neutral + muted olive + stone beige
space_requests: Phong khach tran cao lien thong san vuon
Bep va ban an nhin ra vuon sau
Phong ngu ong ba o tang 1
Phong lam viec rieng cho chu nha
Tang 2 co sinh hoat chung nho
spatial_preferences: Cong cong va rieng tu tach ro
Luu thong truc quan tu sanh vao phong khach va bep
Mo nhieu huong nhin ra cay xanh
design_goals: Hien dai nhiet doi, sang trong tiet che
Noi that am ap, sang va thoang
must_haves: View vuon cho phong khach va bep
Mat tien hien dai va co chieu sau
must_not_haves: Khong gian toi va bi chia nho
Cau thang cat ngang phong khach
notes: Muc tieu la bo client-ready 3D de khach hang co the quyet nhanh concept
Can video walkthrough de mo phong trai nghiem den, vao va su dung khong gian
